zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey de Percy於1000年出生在法國巴-諾門迪曼其沙吉利o珀西時，他的父親William Mainfred d'Perci21歲，母親Margaret18歲。他於1029年與Margaret Forez在法國諾門迪結婚。他們至少是8個兒子的父母。他去世於1050年之後。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Percy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

variants.name: Piercey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

variants.name: Piercy
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey de Percy was born in 1000, in Percy, Saint-Lô, Manche, Lower Normandy, France, his father, William Mainfred d'Perci, was 21 and his mother, Margaret, was 18. He married Margaret Forez in 1029, in Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 8 sons. He died after 1050.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey de Percy est né en 1000, à Percy, Saint-Lô, Manche, Basse-Normandie, France, son père, William Mainfred d'Perci, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Margaret, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Forez en 1029, à Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils. Il est décédé après 1050.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffrey de Percy 1000 in Percy, Saint-Lô, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Mainfred d'Perci 21 und seine Mutter Margaret 18. Er hat 1029 in Normandie, Frankreich Margaret Forez geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne. Er starb nach 1050.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey de Percy è nato il nel 1000 nel Percy, Saint-Lô, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, William Mainfred d'Perci, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Margaret, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Forez nel 1029, nel Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli. Morì dopo il 1050.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Percyが1000年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディマンチェサイント-ルoペルシで生まれた時，父William Mainfred d'Perciは21歳，母Margaretは18歳であった。1029年にフランスノーマンディでMargaret Forezと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子の親であった。彼は1050年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Percy(이)가 1000년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 먼체 세인트-o 퍼시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Mainfred d'Perci(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1029년 프랑스 노먼디에서 Margaret Forez(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1050년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey de Percy nasceu em 1000, em Percy, Saint-Lô, Manche, Basse-Normandie, França, seu pai, William Mainfred d'Perci, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Margaret, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Forez em 1029, em Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos. Ele faleceu após 1050.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey de Percy родился в 1000 г. в местности пирси, сеинт-лo, манч, бассе-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени William Mainfred d'Perci было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Forez в 1029 г. в местности норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей. Он умер после 1050 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffrey de Percy nació en 1000, en Percy, Saint-Lô, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Francia, su papá, William Mainfred d'Perci, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Margaret, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Margaret Forez en 1029, en Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos. Murió después de 1050.
